title: Carpool Optimizer
description: Full stack web app to automize creating carpools. Uses Express, React, Node.js, and Docker. Has options for using either public OSRM API calls or a locally set up OSRM API.

title: Dragon Boat Lineup Creater
description: React web app for creating practice and race lineups for my dragon boat team. Features drag to drop, roster lookup, and other google-sheet style functions. Automation work in progress.

title: F1-Telemetry-App
description: Full stack app for tracking and recording real time telemetry for F12020 game. Uses FAST API, React, Node.js, and Supabase database with PostgreSQL.

title: Oversteer Detecter
description: Fine-tuned VideoMAE Base Kinetics for onboard oversteer detection using resized positional embeddings. Reduced validation loss by 24% and improved accuracy by 2% using custom LoRA adaptation modules. Built and labeled a 972-sample dataset (nosteer, oversteer, understeer) using Hugging Face Datasets.

title: 3D-Space-Planner
description: Light weight CAD software for visualizaing 3D spaces built entirely with React. Inspired by my small dorm room.

title: NutriAI
description: SFHacks 2025 submission project. Uses prompt tuning and Gemeni Api to create user custom water and meal planner.

title: Socioeconomic Outages

title: Secret-Scanner
description: Just a React Web App with confidence scores for detecting API keys in text and GitHub repos.
